title: AI Translator
description: Translate any text via large language models — cloud APIs, local servers (Ollama), and in-browser WebLLM. API keys, base URLs and model choices all live in localStorage.

notice.title: API keys never leave your browser
notice.body: Every request goes from your browser straight to the provider you choose; this tool is not a proxy. Cloud API keys live in localStorage — clear them anytime.

glossary.heading: Glossary
glossary.confirmClear: Clear all glossary entries? This cannot be undone.
glossary.empty: No entries yet. Click "Add" to start, or "Import" an existing JSON.

files.dropCta: Drop files or click to choose
files.dropHint: .txt / .md / .markdown / .mdx; max 2 MB per file; multiple OK

history.heading: Translation history
history.empty: No history yet — successful translations are saved here automatically.
history.confirmClearAll: Clear all translation history? This cannot be undone.

panel.inputPlaceholder: Paste or type the text to translate. Ctrl/⌘ + Enter to translate.
panel.outputPlaceholder: Translation streams in character by character

error.missingApiKey: API key missing — open Settings and add one for the selected provider.
error.missingModel: No model selected — open Settings to pick or type a model name.
error.missingBaseUrl: Base URL missing — open Settings to enter an endpoint.
error.webllmNotInit: WebLLM model is not loaded yet — wait for initialization.
error.ollamaModelNotFound: Ollama doesn't have model "{{model}}" locally. Run `ollama pull {{model}}` in a terminal first, or pick/type a different model in Settings.

tab.cloudNotice: API keys live in this browser only — requests go direct to providers. Anthropic browser calls require you to accept the direct-access header.
tab.localNotice: Local HTTP servers like Ollama must already be running. For OpenAI-compatible local servers, use Cloud → OpenAI-compatible custom and point baseUrl at localhost.
tab.webllmNotice: First run downloads a model (hundreds of MB) and runs fully in-browser (requires WebGPU). Subsequent runs reuse the cached model.

field.modelHint: Pick a common model from the dropdown, or choose "Custom…" to type any model name (e.g. a tag you pulled with Ollama).

provider.customHint: Any endpoint that implements OpenAI Chat Completions. Use this for LM Studio, vllm, or self-hosted compatible servers.
provider.ollamaHint: Model name must match `ollama pull` / `ollama list` exactly (including tag), e.g. `qwen2.5:3b`. Models not listed below can be typed directly.
provider.webllmHint: MLC official model IDs — see the prebuilt list at https://github.com/mlc-ai/web-llm. Larger models require more VRAM.
